source_pr.title: *: use `explain format = 'brief'` for tests
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/22663

Problem Summary:
Do not print ID in the explain output of test cases.

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:

Use new syntax `explain format = 'brief'` for a simpler plan output, which is more stable.

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

Side effects

N/A

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- N/A

symptoms: firstOperator := tk.MustQuery("explain format = 'brief' select /*+ inl_merge_join(t1,t2) */ * from t1 left join t2 on t1.a = t2.a and t1.c = t2.c and t1.b = t2.b order by t1.a desc").Rows()[0][0].(string) (executor/index_lookup_merge_join_test.go)
failure_signature: firstOperator := tk.MustQuery("explain format = 'brief' select /*+ inl_merge_join(t1,t2) */ * from t1 left join t2 on t1.a = t2.a and t1.c = t2.c and t1.b = t2.b order by t1.a desc").Rows()[0][0].(string) (executor/index_lookup_merge_join_test.go)
fix_pattern: firstOperator := tk.MustQuery("explain format = 'brief' select /*+ inl_merge_join(t1,t2) */ * from t1 left join t2 on t1.a = t2.a and t1.c = t2.c and t1.b = t2.b order by t1.a desc").Rows()[0][0].(string) (executor/index_lookup_merge_join_test.go)
